mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_subscription (user_id, post_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE deleted_at = NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE post_subscription SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM post_subscription WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_subscription (user_id, comment_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{commentId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE deleted_at = NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comment_subscription SET deleted_at = COALESCE(deleted_at, NOW()) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND comment_id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM comment_subscription WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND comment_id IN
#{cid}
